scope: Correct Leads/Campaigns shell after client review: keep the main app sidebar and remove the separate prototype topbar/tab shell while preserving prototype styling inside the content area.
reason: Client review flagged that Campaigns lost the side panel and switching to Leads felt like a different page. The old Leads page should be styled like the prototype inside the existing app shell, not replace the app shell.

appLayout: Removed route-level sidebar suppression for /campaigns and /leads.
Shows the full sidebar from md breakpoint on /campaigns and /leads so it remains visible at the 918px QA viewport.
Keeps the mobile drawer/topbar only below md for /campaigns and /leads.
campaignsPage: Removed the internal prototype topbar and Leads/Campaigns tab nav.
Kept the dark prototype background, AI Retarget Suggestions, cap/cooldown/lineage styling, filters, and campaign table inside the normal app shell.
leadsPage: Removed the internal prototype topbar and Leads/Campaigns tab nav.
Kept the old Leads route/page and applied the prototype scope note, readable source comparison, Source/State/Last Contact filters, and table styling inside the normal app shell.

validation.vscodeProblems: No errors in AppLayout, LeadsPage, CampaignsPage, globals.css.
validation.build: npm run build passed after shell/sidebar correction: server tsc, client tsc, Vite production build.
